---
title: "Activities"
format: html
---


### 17 Mar 2026 Guest Lecturer 

Course: PIA 6204 Statistical Analysis for Public Policy and Management (Instructor: Yanto Chandra)

Topic: **Using R for Data Exploration and Visualization**


### Jan 2025 - Jun 2025 Teaching Assistant

Course: PIA 6204 Statistical Analysis for Public Policy and Management (Instructor: Yanto Chandra)

Topic: **An Introduction to Survey Experiment**
